channel.title: WSL2 on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in WSL2 on ExitCode0

item.title: Give Claude Code Eyes Inside Your WSL2 Docker Containers
item.description: Stop copy-pasting Docker Compose logs into Claude Code. Set up SSH access into WSL2 so Claude can read your container logs directly - the same trick that powers a pentest workflow with a Kali VM.

item.title: How to force the Windows 10 20H2 update
item.description: Manually install Windows 10 20H2 using the Microsoft Update Assistant. Bypass the phased rollout of the October 2020 feature update on compatible hardware.

item.title: How to force the Windows 10 2004 update
item.description: Force Windows 10 version 2004 to install immediately using Microsoft's Update Assistant. Skip the staggered rollout and upgrade to the May 2020 feature update manually.
